case_title: GOVIL, JAGDISH P. VS LARSON, KENNETH W.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GOVIL, JAGDISH P. AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, KENNETH W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, KENNETH W.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOVIL, JAGDISH P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARSON, KENNETH W. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,008.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LARSON, KENNETH W. HEARING SET FOR DEC-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-24-1992, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-19-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOVIL, JAGDISH P. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LARSON, KENNETH W. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOVIL, JAGDISH P. HEARING SET FOR FEB-04-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF FEB-04-1993, DENIED
